Dice roll lab — isolated from the SPA. Fixed XZ play pen (wireframe box), convex vertex floor contact, soft die–die bumps. Apply & re-roll also runs a short scripted box shake (like rattling a lid in 3D: up/down and sideways). Short click on empty canvas (outside the panel) or Space to re-roll only. Use the panel for dice count, facets per die, and gravity (m/s²; live while you drag the slider). Non–d6 solids use the same style of canvas face textures (lab value order on mesh, not casino engraving).
HUD: D1:… when all dice have settled.
